case_title: KOON KOON LOUIE VS. ANTHONY RICHARDSON et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KOON KOON
RECEIVED VIA MAIL, CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF REQUESTING FOR CHINESE CANTONESE TRANSLATOR WHICH QUALIFIED FOR IFP WAIVER OF COST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KOON KOON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-16-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER INTERPRETER KENNY FUNG PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KOON KOON ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-28-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BEATTY, ELIZABETH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KOON KOON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, ANTHONY BEATTY, ELIZABETH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-28-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, ANTHONY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LOUIE, KOON KOON AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, ANTHONY BEATTY, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KOON KOON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF INTERPRETER GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
